battle-focus.name: Battle Focus
battle-focus.description:
At the start of each battle round, you receive a number of Battle Focus tokens based on the size of the battle: Incursion - 2 tokens, Strike Force - 4 tokens, Onslaught - 6 tokens. Each time one of the triggers shown in the Agile Manoeuvres section occurs, you can spend one Battle Focus token to enable the relevant eligible unit to perform that Agile Manoeuvre. A unit can only perform one Agile Manoeuvre per phase. Unless otherwise stated, you cannot trigger the same Agile Manoeuvre more than once per phase. At the end of the battle round, all unspent Battle Focus tokens are lost.

Agile Manoeuvres:
■ Swift as the Wind: When an eligible unit is selected to make a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit until end of phase.
■ Flitting Shadows: When an eligible unit is selected to make a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, is set up on the battlefield, or declares a charge. Until end of turn, enemy units cannot use Fire Overwatch against that unit.
■ Star Engines: When an eligible VEHICLE unit is selected to make an Advance move. Until end of turn, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.
■ Sudden Strike: When an eligible unit is selected to fight. Until end of phase, Pile-in and Consolidation moves can be up to 6" instead of 3".
■ Opportunity Seized: When an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move. One eligible unit (excluding TITANIC) that was within Engagement Range can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".
■ Fade Back: In opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot. One eligible unit (excluding TITANIC) hit by one or more attacks can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".

disparate-paths.name: Disparate Paths
disparate-paths.description: When mustering your army, you can include HARLEQUINS units in your army, even though they do not have the ASURYANI Faction keyword. Unless otherwise stated, you cannot select HARLEQUINS or YNNARI as your Army Faction.

abilities.name: Tactical Acumen
abilities.description: After this model's unit shoots, it can make a Normal move up to 6". If it does, it is not eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Hand of Asuryan
abilities.description: Once per battle, when this model is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, its Bloody Twins has a Damage characteristic of 3 and the [ANTI-INFANTRY 5+] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Dire Avengers

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D3
abilities.description: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play. On a 2+, each unit within 6" suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Molten Form
abilities.description: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, halve the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: The Bloody-Handed (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly AELDARI unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, subtract 1 from the Hit rolls of attacks made by this model.

abilities.name: Superlative Strategist
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit, and you can re-roll any rolls made for that unit while it is performing an Agile Manoeuvre.

abilities.name: Path of Command
abilities.description: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Dark Reapers
■ Dire Avengers
■ Fire Dragons
■ Guardian Defenders
■ Howling Banshees
■ Storm Guardians
■ Striking Scorpions

abilities.name: Indomitable Strength of Will
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable that unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.

abilities.name: Path of Command
abilities.description: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:

■ Swooping Hawks
■ Warp Spiders

abilities.name: Cloudstrider
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, at the end of your opponent's turn, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy models, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. When that unit uses Deep Strike to be set up on the battlefield, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Cry of the Wind
abilities.description: Each time this model is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, each time this model makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Swooping Hawks

abilities.name: Scouts 7"
abilities.description: After both sides have deployed, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 7" before the first battle round begins.

abilities.name: Reavers of the Void
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Scouts 7"
abilities.description: After both sides have deployed, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 7" before the first battle round begins.

abilities.name: Piratical Raiders
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent's army. Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities while targeting that unit.

abilities.name: Skyhunter
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Support Artillery
abilities.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model can join one GUARDIAN DEFENDERS unit from your army (a unit cannot have more than one SUPPORT WEAPON model joined to it). If it does, it is treated as being part of that unit and increases the Starting Strength of that unit accordingly. This model cannot embark within Transports.

abilities.name: Structural Collapse
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack with its D-cannon, re-roll a Damage roll of 1. If that attack targets a TITANIC unit, you can re-roll the Damage roll instead.

abilities.name: Inescapable Accuracy
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Cruel Amusement
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, each time this model is selected to shoot, select one of the abilities below. Until the end of the phase, this model's Shrieker Cannon has that ability: [IGNORES COVER], [PRECISION], or [SUSTAINED HITS 3].

abilities.name: Death is Not Enough
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If one or more of those attacks destroyed a model in that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Flip Belt
abilities.description: Each time the bearer's unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, ignore any vertical distance when determining the total distance the bearer can be moved during that move.

abilities.name: Bladestorm
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within half range.

abilities.name: Diviner of Futures
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Doom (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a friendly AELDARI model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Branching Fates (Psychic)
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, once per phase, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit (excluding Support Weapon models) to an unmodified 6.

abilities.name: Tears of Isha (Psychic)

Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this TRANSPORT.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.description: This model has a transport capacity of 6 HARLEQUINS INFANTRY models.

abilities.name: Stormblades
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Dance of Death

■ Hero's Prowess: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1.
■ Villain's Doom: Add 1 to Wound rolls.
■ Trickster's Grace: Subtract 1 from the Hit rolls of attacks that target this unit.

It does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends it as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

abilities.name: Yvraine's Champion
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, other CHARACTER models attached to that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Corsair Voidreavers
■ Corsair Voidscarred
■ Guardian Defenders
■ Storm Guardians
■ Ynnari Incubi
■ Ynnari Kabalite Warriors
■ Ynnari Wyches

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D3
abilities.description: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play. On a 2+, each unit within 6" suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Inevitable Death
abilities.description: Once in each of your opponent's turns, if this model is on the battlefield when another friendly AELDARI unit is destroyed, just after removing the last model in that unit, you can remove this model from the battlefield and set it up as close as possible to where that destroyed model was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

abilities.name: Ethereal Form
abilities.description: Each time this model destroys an enemy unit, it regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Word of the Phoenix (Psychic)
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, D3+1 destroyed Bodyguard models (excluding SUPPORT WEAPON models) are returned to that unit with their full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Herald of Ynnead
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly AELDARI model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Corsair Voidreavers
■ Corsair Voidscarred
■ Guardian Defenders
■ Storm Guardians
■ Ynnari Incubi
■ Ynnari Kabalite Warriors
■ Ynnari Wyches

abilities.name: Overlord
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While that unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Shadow Field
abilities.description: You cannot re-roll invulnerable saving throws made for the bearer. The first time an invulnerable saving throw made for the bearer is failed, until the end of the battle, the bearer has no invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Ynnari Incubi
■ Ynnari Kabalite Warriors

abilities.name: Tormentors
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Sadistic Raiders
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, if you control an objective marker that this unit is within range of, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D3
abilities.description: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play. On a 2+, each unit within 6" suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Firing Deck 11
abilities.description: Up to 11 models embarked within this TRANSPORT can shoot in their controlling player's Shooting phase.

abilities.name: Aethersails
abilities.description: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.description: This model has a transport capacity of 11 YNNARI INFANTRY models.

abilities.name: Eviscerating Fly-by
abilities.description: Each time this unit ends a Normal Move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Storm of Blades
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Empowered by Death
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, if this model's unit is below its Starting Strength, until the end of the phase, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Ynnari Wyches

abilities.name: Deadly Demise 1
abilities.description: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play. On a 2+, each unit within 6" suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Firing Deck 6
abilities.description: Up to 6 models embarked within this TRANSPORT can shoot in their controlling player's Shooting phase.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.description: This model has a transport capacity of 6 YNNARI INFANTRY models.

abilities.name: No Escape
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability is selected to Fall Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test.
